choice: Implement bracketed federal+state tax rates instead of a flat effective rate. Treat the withdrawal + income stream as the net taxable amount (no deductions or tax-return-grade modeling), and apply the bracketed rates to that net amount.
rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: Keep the spreadsheet's flat effective-rate tax as a deliberate v1 simplification — apply a single configurable effective rate to taxable withdrawals/income per step — rather than bracket-by-bracket federal+state modeling. This is explicitly OUT of v1 scope (tax-return-grade modeling) and a conscious delta to revisit later.)
